docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAYLOR MAIA--OWNER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SUHONOS, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT PIZZA ORGASMICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PIZZA ORGASMICA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100. 00 SERVED MAR-25-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PIZZA ORGASMICA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUHONOS, NICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PIZZA ORGASMICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
